name: cb-report-as4
description: CFO Financial System v53 - strict monthly cash burn reports. v53: deposits valued at PRINCIPAL (never revalued) from the month-end balance confirmation, with blocking date/revalued guards (Addition T-2); plus a VENDOR_CLASSIF income-row guard (v52.1/PATCH P-1) protecting interest rows from expense reclassification. Retains v50-v52 balance-source precedence, FX single-source, and Desc2 classification. Additive; columns A-R fixed.
